title: subitem column change in workflows

posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
I can change a status, set a date, set a number, and connect a board on the subitem level of workflows.

Yet, I can’t change neither a column value on the subitem level nor update a subitem altogether.

This would immensely help with our current workflow processes, utilizing workflows .

posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
I see that this has now been solved.

Thanks!
